info.title: acuk.aws.cli
info.description: A CLI tool that extends the secrets functionality of the AWS CLI tool, allowing you to query on specific secrets (if they are stored in a key value pair format)

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the secret to be retrieved

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Prints all messages to standard
output.

options.name: --key
options.description:
specifies the what secret should be retrieved if
they are stored in KVP format

options.name: --aws-region
options.description:
set the AWS region (if not specified in the
AWS_REGION environment variable

options.name: --aws-secret-key-id
options.description:
set the AWS secret key id (if not specified in the
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID environment variable

options.name: --aws-secret-key
options.description:
set the AWS secret key access key (if not specified
in the AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY environment variable

options.name: --listkeys
options.description:
(Default: false) list all the keys for the
specified secret
